education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Business Administration

experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Conducted data analysis using Microsoft Excel and SQL to generate insights on public health programs.
Assisted in the evaluation of health programs and performance metrics to improve service delivery.
Prepared reports and presentations for stakeholders to communicate findings and recommendations.
Engaged with community members to gather feedback and enhance program effectiveness.

experience.title: Program Assistant
responsibilities: Supported program implementation and evaluation for various community services.
Managed budgets for small-scale projects, ensuring financial compliance.
Assisted in the coordination of community events and stakeholder meetings.
Utilized qualitative research methods to gather data from program participants.

response.summary: Detail-oriented professional with experience in data analysis and program evaluation within the public sector. Committed to improving community services through effective stakeholder engagement and data-driven decision-making.
